title: Same-Day Delivery
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/040969f5fec4e98d20da2958150f62d3ede02cdd.png)

You built a new base a few thousand blocks from your old one and want to move all of your items? Or maybe you got tired of your survival world and want to start a new one, but keep some of your gear?

Same-Day Delivery allows you to do all that. You store your items in a barrel, mark it with a shipping label, and left-click to send it. By crafting a Delivery Request Form and right-clicking it you can then retrieve your items at any time and in any place, even in a different Minecraft world!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FFG7XYm94O8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
